## isDefined() function

Given a value of type Nullable<T>, validates value is T

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function isDefined<T>(value: Nullable<T>): value is T;
```

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  value | [Nullable](./common.nullable.md)<!-- -->&lt;T&gt; |  |
